title: Wire local task store into the Orchestrator workflow
description: Until the Atlassian MCP server is provisioned, the Orchestrator must read tickets from `tasks/*.json` instead of Jira. Add a thin adapter so the rest of the workflow (Researcher, Developer, Reviewer hand-offs, status transitions, comment appending) is unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: Orchestrator can list all tasks where status == 'todo' from the local store.
Orchestrator can transition a task's status and persist the change to its JSON file with an updated `updated_at` timestamp.
Orchestrator can append a comment to a task with author, ISO-8601 timestamp, and markdown body.
`index.json` is regenerated from per-task files after any write.

comments.author: orchestrator
comments.body: Picked up after TASK-004 closed. No research needed — adapter is thin file I/O on top of `src/atomic-write.js` and the existing `tasks/schema.json`. Workflow: developer writes failing Vitest suite covering all 4 ACs, then implements `src/task-store.js`, then reviewer audits in fresh context.
